title: Sataracha Salman
overview: Arun always wanted to be an actor but could never fulfill his dream, for which the village ridiculed him. Angry about his failure, Arun challenges the entire village that his son, Amit, will fulfill his dream and become a superstar. This dream becomes Amit`s journey.
